title: dolichos trilobus subsp. trilobus
intro: Dolichos trilobus subsp. trilobus, also known as the Asian kidney bean or trilobed dolichos, is a plant species belonging to the legume family that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Dolichos trilobus subsp. trilobus include its ability to help manage conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and hypertension. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as dried and powdered for use in capsules or tablets, making it a versatile treatment option.
